content:
C4Context
title C4 Context — Customer Ordering Platform (Template)

Enterprise_Boundary(e0, "Acme Corp") {
  Person(customer, "Customer", "Browses catalog, places orders, tracks delivery")
  Person_Ext(support, "Customer Support", "Helps customers with orders and returns")

  System(ordering, "Customer Ordering Platform", "Web + Mobile", "Allows customers to place orders and manage their account")

  System_Boundary(sb1, "Core Supporting Systems") {
    System(inventory, "Inventory Service", "Tracks stock levels and reservations")
    System(pricing, "Pricing Service", "Calculates prices, discounts, taxes")
  }
}

System_Ext(payment, "Payment Provider", "Processes card payments and refunds")
System_Ext(shipping, "Shipping Carrier API", "Creates shipments and provides tracking events")
System_Ext(email, "Email/SMS Gateway", "Sends notifications and OTP codes")
System_Ext(identity, "Identity Provider (SSO)", "Authenticates users and issues tokens")
System_Ext(analytics, "Analytics Platform", "Collects product and funnel events")

Rel(customer, ordering, "Places orders, manages account", "HTTPS")
Rel(support, ordering, "Views customer orders, issues refunds", "HTTPS")

Rel(ordering, identity, "Sign-in / token validation", "OIDC / OAuth2")
Rel(ordering, inventory, "Reserve/release stock", "REST/JSON")
Rel(ordering, pricing, "Get price + promotions", "REST/JSON")

Rel(ordering, payment, "Authorize/capture/refund", "HTTPS")
Rel(ordering, shipping, "Create shipment + tracking", "HTTPS")
Rel(ordering, email, "Order confirmations + status alerts", "HTTPS")
Rel(ordering, analytics, "Event stream (page views, conversions)", "HTTPS")

UpdateElementStyle(customer, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#0f172a", $borderColor="#0f172a")
UpdateElementStyle(support, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#334155", $borderColor="#334155")

UpdateElementStyle(ordering, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#2563eb", $borderColor="#1d4ed8")
UpdateElementStyle(inventory, $fontColor="#0f172a", $bgColor="#e2e8f0", $borderColor="#94a3b8")
UpdateElementStyle(pricing, $fontColor="#0f172a", $bgColor="#e2e8f0", $borderColor="#94a3b8")

UpdateElementStyle(payment, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#16a34a", $borderColor="#15803d")
UpdateElementStyle(shipping, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#f97316", $borderColor="#ea580c")
UpdateElementStyle(email, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#a855f7", $borderColor="#7e22ce")
UpdateElementStyle(identity, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#0891b2", $borderColor="#0e7490")
UpdateElementStyle(analytics, $fontColor="#0f172a", $bgColor="#fde68a", $borderColor="#f59e0b")

UpdateRelStyle(ordering, payment, $textColor="#14532d", $lineColor="#16a34a")
UpdateRelStyle(ordering, shipping, $textColor="#7c2d12", $lineColor="#f97316")
UpdateRelStyle(ordering, identity, $textColor="#164e63", $lineColor="#0891b2")
UpdateRelStyle(ordering, analytics, $textColor="#92400e", $lineColor="#f59e0b")
name: Customer-Ordering

content:
C4Container
title C4 Container — Customer Ordering Platform (Template)

Enterprise_Boundary(e0, "Acme Corp") {

  Person(customer, "Customer", "Places orders and tracks deliveries")
  Person_Ext(agent, "Customer Support", "Assists with orders, refunds, and issues")

  System_Boundary(s1, "Customer Ordering Platform") {

    Container(web, "Web App", "React / Next.js", "Customer-facing UI for browsing, ordering, account management")
    Container(mobile, "Mobile App", "iOS/Android", "Mobile experience for ordering and notifications")
    Container(api, "API Gateway", "Node.js / BFF", "Single entry point; auth, routing, orchestration, rate limiting")

    Container(orderSvc, "Order Service", "Java / Spring Boot", "Order lifecycle: create, pay, cancel, returns")
    Container(catalogSvc, "Catalog Service", "Go", "Product catalog, search, and availability views")
    Container(pricingSvc, "Pricing Service", "Python", "Pricing rules, promotions, tax calculation")
    Container(inventorySvc, "Inventory Service", "Java", "Stock levels, reservations, allocation")

    ContainerDb(orderDb, "Order DB", "PostgreSQL", "Orders, payments, refunds, order events")
    ContainerDb(catalogDb, "Catalog DB", "PostgreSQL", "Products, categories, attributes")
    ContainerDb(pricingDb, "Pricing DB", "PostgreSQL", "Promotions, price books, tax tables")
    ContainerDb(inventoryDb, "Inventory DB", "PostgreSQL", "Stock, reservations, warehouses")

    Container(queue, "Event Bus", "Kafka", "Asynchronous events for integration and analytics")
    Container(worker, "Background Worker", "Worker / Jobs", "Async processing: emails, retries, outbox publishing")

    Container(admin, "Support Console", "Web UI", "Internal console for support agents (orders, refunds, customer lookup)")
  }
}

System_Ext(identity, "Identity Provider (SSO)", "OIDC/OAuth2")
System_Ext(payment, "Payment Provider", "Card payments and refunds")
System_Ext(shipping, "Shipping Carrier API", "Shipment creation and tracking updates")
System_Ext(msg, "Email/SMS Gateway", "Customer notifications")
System_Ext(analytics, "Analytics Platform", "Product and funnel analytics")

Rel(customer, web, "Uses", "HTTPS")
Rel(customer, mobile, "Uses", "HTTPS")
Rel(agent, admin, "Uses", "HTTPS")

Rel(web, api, "Calls", "HTTPS/JSON")
Rel(mobile, api, "Calls", "HTTPS/JSON")
Rel(admin, api, "Calls", "HTTPS/JSON")

Rel(api, identity, "Authenticates users", "OIDC/OAuth2")

Rel(api, orderSvc, "Order APIs", "REST/JSON")
Rel(api, catalogSvc, "Catalog/search APIs", "REST/JSON")
Rel(api, pricingSvc, "Pricing/discount APIs", "REST/JSON")
Rel(api, inventorySvc, "Inventory APIs", "REST/JSON")

Rel(orderSvc, orderDb, "Reads/Writes", "JDBC")
Rel(catalogSvc, catalogDb, "Reads/Writes", "JDBC")
Rel(pricingSvc, pricingDb, "Reads/Writes", "JDBC")
Rel(inventorySvc, inventoryDb, "Reads/Writes", "JDBC")

Rel(orderSvc, payment, "Authorize/capture/refund", "HTTPS")
Rel(orderSvc, shipping, "Create shipment", "HTTPS")
Rel(orderSvc, queue, "Publishes order events", "Kafka")

Rel(queue, worker, "Delivers events/jobs", "Kafka")
Rel(worker, msg, "Sends notifications", "HTTPS")
Rel(worker, analytics, "Pushes event stream", "HTTPS")

UpdateElementStyle(web, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#2563eb", $borderColor="#1d4ed8")
UpdateElementStyle(mobile, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#1d4ed8", $borderColor="#1e40af")
UpdateElementStyle(api, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#0ea5e9", $borderColor="#0284c7")

UpdateElementStyle(orderSvc, $fontColor="#0f172a", $bgColor="#e2e8f0", $borderColor="#94a3b8")
UpdateElementStyle(catalogSvc, $fontColor="#0f172a", $bgColor="#e2e8f0", $borderColor="#94a3b8")
UpdateElementStyle(pricingSvc, $fontColor="#0f172a", $bgColor="#e2e8f0", $borderColor="#94a3b8")
UpdateElementStyle(inventorySvc, $fontColor="#0f172a", $bgColor="#e2e8f0", $borderColor="#94a3b8")
UpdateElementStyle(worker, $fontColor="#0f172a", $bgColor="#f1f5f9", $borderColor="#94a3b8")
UpdateElementStyle(queue, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#111827", $borderColor="#111827")
UpdateElementStyle(admin, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#334155", $borderColor="#334155")

UpdateElementStyle(orderDb, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#0f172a", $borderColor="#0f172a")
UpdateElementStyle(catalogDb, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#0f172a", $borderColor="#0f172a")
UpdateElementStyle(pricingDb, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#0f172a", $borderColor="#0f172a")
UpdateElementStyle(inventoryDb, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#0f172a", $borderColor="#0f172a")

UpdateElementStyle(identity, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#0891b2", $borderColor="#0e7490")

UpdateElementStyle(shipping, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#f97316", $borderColor="#ea580c")

content:
C4Component
title C4 Component — Order Service (Simple Template)

System_Boundary(s1, "Customer Ordering Platform") {
  Container_Boundary(c1, "Order Service") {

    Component(api, "Order API", "REST", "Endpoints for create/cancel/return orders")
    Component(app, "Use-Case Orchestrator", "Application", "Coordinates business flows and transactions")

    Component(domain, "Order Domain", "Domain", "Aggregates, invariants, domain events")
    Component(repo, "Order Repository", "Data Access", "Persistence + optimistic locking")

    Component(integ, "Integrations", "Adapters", "Payment + Shipping (outbound)")
    Component(events, "Event Publisher", "Messaging", "Publishes order events")

    ComponentDb(db, "Order DB", "PostgreSQL", "Orders + order items + outbox")
  }
}

System_Ext(payment, "Payment Provider", "Payments / refunds")
System_Ext(carrier, "Shipping Carrier API", "Shipments / tracking")
System_Ext(bus, "Event Bus", "Kafka / PubSub")

Rel(api, app, "Invokes use-cases", "in-process")
Rel(app, domain, "Applies business rules", "in-process")
Rel(app, repo, "Loads/saves aggregates", "in-process")
Rel(repo, db, "Reads/Writes", "SQL")
Rel(app, integ, "Calls adapters", "in-process")
Rel(integ, payment, "Authorize/capture/refund", "HTTPS")
Rel(integ, carrier, "Create shipment", "HTTPS")
Rel(app, events, "Emits events", "in-process")
Rel(events, bus, "Publishes", "async")

UpdateElementStyle(api, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#2563eb", $borderColor="#1d4ed8")
UpdateElementStyle(app, $fontColor="#0f172a", $bgColor="#e2e8f0", $borderColor="#94a3b8")
UpdateElementStyle(domain, $fontColor="#0f172a", $bgColor="#f1f5f9", $borderColor="#94a3b8")
UpdateElementStyle(repo, $fontColor="#0f172a", $bgColor="#e2e8f0", $borderColor="#94a3b8")

UpdateElementStyle(integ, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#16a34a", $borderColor="#15803d")
UpdateElementStyle(events, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#111827", $borderColor="#111827")
UpdateElementStyle(db, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#0f172a", $borderColor="#0f172a")

UpdateElementStyle(payment, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#16a34a", $borderColor="#15803d")
UpdateElementStyle(carrier, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#f97316", $borderColor="#ea580c")
UpdateElementStyle(bus, $fontColor="white", $bgColor="#334155", $borderColor="#334155")

UpdateRelStyle(api, app, $lineColor="#2563eb", $textColor="#0f172a")
UpdateRelStyle(repo, db, $lineColor="#0f172a", $textColor="#0f172a")

UpdateRelStyle(integ, carrier, $lineColor="#f97316", $textColor="#7c2d12")

name: Ordering-Service

content:
flowchart LR

%% ============ Node Styles ============
classDef client fill:#0f172a,stroke:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef edge fill:#2563eb,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef core fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a,rx:12,ry:12
classDef data fill:#0f172a,stroke:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef async fill:#111827,stroke:#111827,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef ext fill:#0891b2,stroke:#0e7490,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef notify fill:#a855f7,stroke:#7e22ce,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef obs fill:#334155,stroke:#334155,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12

%% ============ Phase 1 ============
subgraph P1["Client and Entry"]
direction LR
C[Client Web or Mobile]:::client
CDN[CDN or WAF]:::edge
GW[API Gateway]:::edge
end

%% ============ Phase 2 ============
subgraph P2["Auth and Processing"]
direction LR
AUTH[Auth Middleware]:::ext
BFF[BFF Orchestrator]:::core
SVC[Domain Service]:::core
end

%% ============ Phase 3 ============
subgraph P3["Data Layer"]
direction TB
CACHE[(Redis Cache)]:::data
DB[(Primary Database)]:::data
SEARCH[(Search Engine)]:::data
end

%% ============ Phase 4 ============
subgraph P4["Async and Integrations"]
direction TB
BUS[[Event Bus]]:::async
WORKER[Background Worker]:::async
PAY[Payment Provider]:::ext
CRM[CRM System]:::ext
end

%% ============ Phase 5 ============
subgraph P5["Notifications and Observability"]
direction TB
MSG[Email or SMS Gateway]:::notify
PUSH[Push Notification Service]:::notify
OTEL[Telemetry Platform]:::obs
end

%% ============ Main Flow ============
C -->|HTTPS| CDN
CDN -->|HTTPS| GW
GW -->|Forward| AUTH
AUTH -->|Allow| BFF
BFF -->|Call| SVC

%% ============ Data Access ============
SVC -->|Read Write| DB
SVC -->|Cache Lookup| CACHE
SVC -->|Search Query| SEARCH

%% ============ Async ============
SVC -->|Publish Event| BUS
BUS -->|Consume| WORKER
WORKER -->|Send Message| MSG
WORKER -->|Send Push| PUSH
WORKER -->|Payment Action| PAY
WORKER -->|Create Case| CRM

%% ============ Observability ============
GW -.-> OTEL
AUTH -.-> OTEL
BFF -.-> OTEL
SVC -.-> OTEL
WORKER -.-> OTEL

%% ============ Response ============
SVC -->|Response| BFF
BFF -->|HTTP Response| GW
GW -->|HTTPS| C

%% ============ Subgraph styling ============
style P1 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style P2 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style P3 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style P4 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style P5 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
name: API-Flow

content:
flowchart LR

classDef actor fill:#0f172a,stroke:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef stage fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,color:#0f172a,rx:14,ry:14
classDef touch fill:#2563eb,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef ops fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a,rx:12,ry:12
classDef sys fill:#111827,stroke:#111827,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef support fill:#0891b2,stroke:#0e7490,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef pain fill:#fee2e2,stroke:#ef4444,color:#7f1d1d,rx:12,ry:12
classDef metric fill:#fde68a,stroke:#f59e0b,color:#92400e,rx:12,ry:12

subgraph SB["Service Blueprint Template"]
direction TB

subgraph L1["Customer Actions"]
direction LR
CA1[Discover service]:::touch
CA2[Sign in]:::touch
CA3[Request service]:::touch
CA4[Receive outcome]:::touch
end

subgraph L2["Frontstage Touchpoints"]
direction LR
F1[Website or App]:::ops
F2[Login screen]:::ops
F3[Request form]:::ops
F4[Status updates]:::ops
end

subgraph L3["Backstage Activities"]
direction LR
B1[Verify identity]:::sys
B2[Validate request]:::sys
B3[Fulfill request]:::sys
B4[Handle exceptions]:::sys
end

subgraph L4["Support Processes"]
direction LR
S1[Knowledge base]:::support
S2[Customer support]:::support
S3[Operations team]:::support
S4[Vendor or partner]:::support
end

subgraph L5["Evidence and Metrics"]
direction LR
M1[Time to first response]:::metric
M2[Completion time]:::metric
M3[Customer satisfaction]:::metric
M4[Rework rate]:::metric
end

end

%% Cross-lane alignment
CA1 --> F1 --> B1 --> S1 --> M1
CA2 --> F2 --> B1 --> S2 --> M1
CA3 --> F3 --> B2 --> S3 --> M2
CA4 --> F4 --> B3 --> S4 --> M3

%% Optional pain points
P1[Pain point: unclear eligibility]:::pain
P2[Pain point: long wait time]:::pain
F1 -.-> P1
F4 -.-> P2

style SB fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style L1 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style L2 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style L3 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style L4 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style L5 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
name: Service-Design

content:
flowchart TB

classDef chan fill:#2563eb,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef cap fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a,rx:12,ry:12
classDef svc fill:#111827,stroke:#111827,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef data fill:#0f172a,stroke:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef ext fill:#0891b2,stroke:#0e7490,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef ops fill:#334155,stroke:#334155,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12

subgraph CH["Channels"]
direction LR
WEB[Web]:::chan
MOB[Mobile]:::chan
AGT[Agent Console]:::chan
end

subgraph CAP["Customer Facing Capabilities"]
direction LR
DISC[Discover and Compare]:::cap
ONB[Onboard and Verify]:::cap
REQ[Request Service]:::cap
TRACK[Track Status]:::cap
SUP[Support and Resolve]:::cap
end

subgraph SVC["Service Components"]
direction LR
GW[API Gateway]:::svc
ID[Identity Service]:::svc
CORE[Core Service]:::svc
RULES[Rules Engine]:::svc
WORK[Workflow Orchestrator]:::svc
NOTIF[Notification Service]:::svc
end

subgraph DATA["Data and Records"]
direction LR
CUST[(Customer Record)]:::data
CASE[(Case Record)]:::data
AUD[(Audit Log)]:::data
end

subgraph EXT["External Partners"]
direction LR
PAY[Payments]:::ext
CRM[CRM]:::ext
KYC[Verification]:::ext
end

subgraph OPS["Operations"]
direction LR
OBS[Observability]:::ops
SEC[Security Monitoring]:::ops
end

WEB --> DISC
MOB --> ONB
AGT --> SUP

DISC --> GW
ONB --> GW
REQ --> GW
TRACK --> GW
SUP --> GW

GW --> ID
GW --> CORE
CORE --> RULES
CORE --> WORK
WORK --> NOTIF

ID --> CUST
CORE --> CASE
CORE --> AUD

CORE --> PAY
WORK --> CRM
ID --> KYC

GW -.-> OBS
CORE -.-> OBS
WORK -.-> OBS
GW -.-> SEC
ID -.-> SEC

style CH fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style CAP fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style SVC fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style DATA fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style EXT fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style OPS fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
name: Service-Design-Architecture

content:
flowchart LR

%% ============ Styles ============
classDef ext fill:#0891b2,stroke:#0e7490,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef proc fill:#2563eb,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff,rx:16,ry:16
classDef store fill:#0f172a,stroke:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,rx:10,ry:10
classDef boundary fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,color:#0f172a,rx:14,ry:14

%% ============ External Entities ============
E1[External Entity A]:::ext
E2[External Entity B]:::ext
E3[External Entity C]:::ext

%% ============ System Boundary ============
subgraph SYS["System Under Design"]
direction LR

P1([Process 1 Ingest and Validate]):::proc
P2([Process 2 Transform and Enrich]):::proc
P3([Process 3 Persist and Serve]):::proc

D1[(Data Store 1 Primary DB)]:::store
D2[(Data Store 2 Data Lake)]:::store
D3[(Data Store 3 Cache)]:::store

end

%% ============ Data Flows ============
E1 -->|Input Data| P1
E2 -->|Reference Data| P1

P1 -->|Validated Records| P2
P2 -->|Enriched Records| P3

P3 -->|Write Transaction| D1
P2 -->|Raw and Enriched Files| D2
P3 -->|Hot Keys| D3

D1 -->|Query Results| P3
D3 -->|Cached Results| P3

P3 -->|Output Data| E3
P2 -->|Exceptions and Alerts| E2

%% ============ Group Styling ============
style SYS fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
name: Data-Flow

flowchart LR

classDef ext fill:#0891b2,stroke:#0e7490,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef proc fill:#2563eb,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff,rx:18,ry:18
classDef store fill:#0f172a,stroke:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,rx:10,ry:10

E1[External Entity A]:::ext
E2[External Entity B]:::ext
E3[External Entity C]:::ext

P0([System Under Design]):::proc

D1[(Primary Data Store)]:::store
D2[(Analytics Store)]:::store

E1 -->|Input Data| P0
E2 -->|Control Data| P0
P0 -->|Responses| E3

P0 -->|Write| D1
D1 -->|Read| P0

P0 -->|Publish Metrics| D2
D2 -->|Insights| P0
name: Data-Flow-L0

content:
flowchart LR

classDef app fill:#0f172a,stroke:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef integ fill:#2563eb,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff,rx:14,ry:14
classDef core fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a,rx:12,ry:12
classDef data fill:#111827,stroke:#111827,color:#ffffff,rx:10,ry:10
classDef ext fill:#0891b2,stroke:#0e7490,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12

subgraph SOURCES["Source Applications"]
direction TB
A1[Application A]:::app
A2[Application B]:::app
A3[Application C]:::app
end

subgraph HUB["Integration Hub"]
direction TB
GW[API Gateway]:::integ
ESB[Integration Layer]:::integ
MAP[Mapping and Transformation]:::core
RULES[Routing and Policy]:::core
OBS[Observability]:::core
CAN[(Canonical Data Model)]:::data
end

subgraph TARGETS["Target Applications"]
direction TB
T1[Application X]:::ext
T2[Application Y]:::ext
T3[Application Z]:::ext
end

A1 -->|API Call| GW
A2 -->|API Call| GW
A3 -->|API Call| GW

GW -->|Validate and Route| RULES
RULES -->|Send| ESB
ESB -->|Transform| MAP
MAP -->|Read Write| CAN

MAP -->|Deliver| T1
MAP -->|Deliver| T2
MAP -->|Deliver| T3

GW -.-> OBS
ESB -.-> OBS
MAP -.-> OBS

style SOURCES fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style HUB fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style TARGETS fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
name: Application-Integration-Hub-Spoke

content:
flowchart LR

classDef app fill:#0f172a,stroke:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef bus fill:#111827,stroke:#111827,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef svc fill:#2563eb,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff,rx:14,ry:14
classDef data fill:#0f172a,stroke:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,rx:10,ry:10
classDef ops fill:#334155,stroke:#334155,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12
classDef ext fill:#0891b2,stroke:#0e7490,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12

subgraph PRODUCERS["Producers"]
direction TB
P1[Application A]:::app
P2[Application B]:::app
end

subgraph PLATFORM["Event Platform"]
direction TB
BUS[[Event Bus]]:::bus
SCHEMA[Schema Registry]:::svc
DLQ[(Dead Letter Queue)]:::data
end

subgraph CONSUMERS["Consumers"]
direction TB
C1[Service X]:::ext
C2[Service Y]:::ext
C3[Service Z]:::ext
end

subgraph OPS["Operations"]
direction TB
OBS[Monitoring and Tracing]:::ops
GOV[Governance and Access]:::ops
end

P1 -->|Publish Event| BUS
P2 -->|Publish Event| BUS

SCHEMA --- BUS

BUS -->|Subscribe| C1
BUS -->|Subscribe| C2
BUS -->|Subscribe| C3

BUS -->|Poison Message| DLQ

BUS -.-> OBS
C1 -.-> OBS
C2 -.-> OBS
C3 -.-> OBS
BUS -.-> GOV

style PRODUCERS fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style PLATFORM fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style CONSUMERS fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style OPS fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
name: Application-Integration-Pub-Sub

content:
---
title: Animal example
---
classDiagram
    note "From Duck till Zebra"
    Animal <|-- Duck
    note for Duck "can fly\ncan swim\ncan dive\ncan help in debugging"
    Animal <|-- Fish
    Animal <|-- Zebra
    Animal : +int age
    Animal : +String gender
    Animal: +isMammal()
    Animal: +mate()
    class Duck{
        +String beakColor
        +swim()
        +quack()
    }
    class Fish{
        -int sizeInFeet
        -canEat()
    }
    class Zebra{
        +bool is_wild
        +run()
    }
name: Class-Diagram

content:
flowchart TB

classDef l1 fill:#0f172a,stroke:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,rx:14,ry:14
classDef l2 fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a,rx:12,ry:12
classDef highlight fill:#2563eb,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff,rx:12,ry:12

subgraph MAP["Capability Map Template"]
direction TB

subgraph D1["Customer Management"]
direction LR
D1A[Customer Identity]:::l2
D1B[Customer Profile]:::l2
D1C[Consent and Preferences]:::l2
D1D[Customer Support]:::l2
end

subgraph D2["Product and Offer"]
direction LR
D2A[Catalog Management]:::l2
D2B[Pricing and Promotions]:::l2
D2C[Offer Configuration]:::l2
D2D[Product Content]:::l2
end

subgraph D3["Order to Cash"]
direction LR
D3A[Order Capture]:::l2
D3B[Order Management]:::highlight
D3C[Payment Processing]:::l2
D3D[Invoicing]:::l2
end

subgraph D4["Fulfillment and Logistics"]
direction LR
D4A[Inventory Management]:::l2
D4B[Fulfillment Execution]:::l2
D4C[Shipping and Tracking]:::l2
D4D[Returns Management]:::l2
end

subgraph D5["Enterprise Enablement"]
direction LR
D5A[Security and Identity]:::l2
D5B[Data and Analytics]:::l2
D5C[Integration Platform]:::l2
D5D[Observability]:::l2
end

end

%% Domain headers styled via subgraph "style" lines
style MAP fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px,rx:16,ry:16
style D1 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style D2 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style D3 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style D4 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
style D5 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:1px
name: Capability-Map

content:
flowchart LR

classDef table fill:#0f172a,stroke:#0f172a,color:#ffffff,rx:10,ry:10
classDef rel fill:#ffffff,stroke:#e2e8f0,color:#0f172a,rx:10,ry:10

CUST[CUSTOMER
PK customer_id
email unique
status
created_at]:::table
ADDR[ADDRESS
PK address_id
FK customer_id
city
postal_code]:::table
ORD[ORDERS
PK order_id
FK customer_id
status
total
created_at]:::table
ITEM[ORDER_ITEM
PK order_item_id
FK order_id
FK product_id
qty
unit_price]:::table
PROD[PRODUCT
PK product_id
sku unique
name
list_price]:::table
PAY[PAYMENT
PK payment_id
FK order_id
status
amount]:::table
SHIP[SHIPMENT
PK shipment_id
FK order_id
tracking unique
status]:::table

CUST -->|1 to many| ORD
CUST -->|1 to many| ADDR
ORD -->|1 to many| ITEM
PROD -->|1 to many| ITEM
ORD -->|1 to many| PAY
ORD -->|1 to many| SHIP
name: Database-Schema
